name: Life Unconfined
overview: After years spent not knowing what to do with our lives, we have finally decided to chase what makes us happy. Inspired by our past road trips, the hippies of the seventies, and the alien, Elon Musk, we are choosing to risk everything. We are selling our traditional home, quitting our current jobs, and moving from Florida to Texas where we will build our dream debt-free off grid shipping container home.

trailers.title: Converting old barn into SOLAR POWERED workshop | Part 1
